metadata.description: AI-powered daily decision and priority framework based on C-suite/scientific methodologies

frameworks.name: Morning Priority Synthesis
frameworks.description: Daily priority setting based on AI analysis of knowledge graph and goals

questions.question: What was the primary plan you set for yourself yesterday?
questions.ai_analysis: Compares stated plan with actual captured activities

questions.question: Yesterday you noted X was happening. Is Y (the dependent task) now ready to proceed?
questions.ai_analysis: Links related tasks from knowledge graph

questions.question: Person X told you about [topic]. Have you verified that information? How complete is your understanding?
questions.ai_analysis: Cross-references with research agent findings

questions.question: The information from X about [topic] - how is it useful across your domains: Health, Career, Relationships, Learning, Finances?
questions.ai_analysis: Maps utility to user's domain knowledge graph

questions.question: Among tasks X, Y, and Z - which comes first? How does each affect the others if delayed?
questions.ai_analysis: Builds dependency map, suggests optimal ordering

questions.question: If you were to fail today, what would be the single biggest cause? How can you eliminate that risk?
questions.ai_analysis: Stores failure modes, builds personal risk profile

questions.question: What type of work matches your current energy level? Analytical, Creative, Administrative, Social, Physical?
questions.ai_analysis: Suggests task types based on time-of-day patterns

frameworks.name: Steelmanning & Opposition Thinking
frameworks.description: Force users to strengthen opposing views before making decisions
frameworks.trigger: Before major decisions or when conflict detected

questions.question: You want to do X. What would someone very smart who disagrees with you say?
questions.ai_analysis: Uses research agent to find counter-arguments

questions.question: What's the strongest evidence that you're wrong about this?
questions.ai_analysis: Searches for disconfirming evidence

questions.question: If you had to bet your life savings on the opposite outcome, what evidence would you need?
questions.ai_analysis: Calibrates confidence level

frameworks.name: Pre-Mortem Analysis
frameworks.description: Imagine future failure and work backward to prevent it

questions.question: It's 6 months from now and this project/decision failed spectacularly. What went wrong? List 3 things.
questions.ai_analysis: Builds failure mode database for user

questions.question: For each failure mode: What one action today would prevent this?
questions.ai_analysis: Creates preventive action checklist

questions.question: What early warning signals should you watch for?
questions.ai_analysis: Sets up monitoring triggers

frameworks.name: Cross-Domain Application
frameworks.trigger: When new concept captured or daily prompt

questions.question: You learned [CONCEPT] in [DOMAIN_A]. How would this apply to [DOMAIN_B] where you also spend time?
questions.ai_analysis: Suggests domain pairings from knowledge graph

questions.question: If you explained [CONCEPT] using an analogy from a completely different field, what would it be?
questions.ai_analysis: Builds novel connections in knowledge graph

questions.question: What would happen if you applied the OPPOSITE of this concept in another domain?
questions.ai_analysis: Generates counter-intuitive insights

frameworks.name: Evening Reflection & Calibration
frameworks.description: Daily review to build learning loops

questions.question: What was your best decision today? Why?
questions.ai_analysis: Identifies successful patterns

questions.question: What would you do differently if you could relive today?
questions.ai_analysis: Builds regret-minimization profile

questions.question: Did you use any mental model today consciously? Which one?
questions.ai_analysis: Tracks mental model adoption over time

questions.question: Rate your day: Energy (1-10), Productivity (1-10), Learning (1-10), Connection (1-10). What correlated with the highest scores?
questions.ai_analysis: Finds personal optimization patterns

ai_priority_list.task: Review CS decomposition notes before class quiz
ai_priority_list.reasoning: High confidence test, recent learning, core concept
Spaced repetition optimal at this interval

ai_priority_list.task: Draft response to gym coach about schedule conflict
Read business case study on transaction fees
ai_priority_list.reasoning: Connects to recent Skittles game learning, high transfer potential

midday_capture.content: Professor explained recursion as 'dream within a dream' - need to connect to decomposition
Saw construction team using modular prefab components - like software modules!

evening_reflection.best_decision: Used audience adaptation framework from English class in group project discussion
evening_reflection.cross_domain_connection: Recursion in CS → Music (fractal compositions) → Business (recursive customer feedback)
